name: cramorant
flavor_texts: It’s so strong that it can knock out some opponents in a single hit, but it also may forget what it’s battling midfight.
This hungry Pokémon swallows Arrokuda whole. Occasionally, it makes a mistake and tries to swallow a Pokémon other than its preferred prey.
text: Cramorant is the Gulp Pokémon. It is a flying and water-type Pokémon. Abilities: gulp-missile. Base stats — HP: 70, Attack: 85, Defense: 55, Sp. Atk: 85, Sp. Def: 95, Speed: 85. Evolution line: cramorant. Lore: It’s so strong that it can knock out some opponents in a single hit, but it also may forget what it’s battling midfight. This hungry Pokémon swallows Arrokuda whole. Occasionally, it makes a mistake and tries to swallow a Pokémon other than its preferred prey.
